Welcome to TSA Token

The World's Only Enterprise Solution for Decentralised Payments.

The structure of this token has been heavily planned using all existing Market statistics. After a careful study of the Cryptocurrency Market, we are happy to introduce to you the methods that would sustain the TSA token as this would not just be a token to raise funds, it would also be an everyday payment token and a tool for major decision on our.

Push The Boundaries of Your Creativity

First of we release our major update with usercenter design which is most important part of TSA Token Sales management. It allows to manage whole process of tokens sales.

Secure Storage

The TSA tokens are stored on your own TSAwallet, using protection measurements such as 2-Factor-Authentification and confirmation through your official TSA account. Only access holders to your TSA account and wallet can manage and see your TSA.

Mobile App

Be an early-bird to the TSAwallet app, allowing to store TSA tokens and exchanging to top marketcap coins (Bitcoin,Eth,LTC,XRP included). Transfer TSA tokens to your TSA credit when making purchases online to get 10% off all TSA products.

Exchange Service

TSAwallet allows lightning-fast exchange with over 20 supported crypto currencies. Bitcoin, Ethereum, Litecoin, XRP, Cardano, to name a few. Exchange TSA at any time without additional fees (blockchain fees apply). You are not obliged to hold TSA at any time of your ownership.

Staking projects

Earn rewards for holding TSA, get up to 10% APY on other coins during the time you own TSA tokens in your app.

The Native Coin of TSA Token

TSA Token will be able to buy and sell via both Decentalized and Centralised exchanges. All from initial Shopping, real estate purchases will be publicity burnt decreasing the overall supply of the Coin.

Analysis & Planning

The TSA app will directly connect to the charging stations and let users pay using the TSA tokens.

Frequently Asked Questions

Frequently asked questions (FAQ) or Questions and Answers (Q&A) are listed questions and answers to clarify the most important aspects of the pre-sale.

  • Pre-Sale & TSA
How to Invest in TSA Token?
1. TSA Token Signup
Visit the Web App and Signup or Login if you already have an account. If you forgot your password just press Forgot Password on the login page and follow the instructions.

2. Get Cryptocurrency
Acquire the required cryptocurrencies of the acceptable payment methods. These include all major cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin, Ethereum, USDT, BNB and a lot more which you can see on the investment page, which you can use to buy TSA Token.

3. Buy TSA Token
Now you Enter the amount of TSA you need accordingly > Select the cryptocurrency you possess > Make the payment and get the expected amount of TSA Token.
What is the goal of the presale?
You can use USD and every major cryptocurrency like Bitcoin, Ethereum, USDT, BNB and a lot more.

Who controls TSA Token ?
TSA Token is decentralized cryptocurrency, no one controls it but you as an investor, backed by some of the most successful companies in the field..
How many Tokens can I buy ?
At this stage you can buy a minimum of 200 $USD worth of TSA Coin and the amount of tokens will vary depending on the price.
TSA Bonus by purchasing with BTC
The amount of TSA bonus is connected to the amount of your BTC deposit.

Tier 1 : 0.03+ BTC = 50% bonus TSA
Tier 2: 0.1+ BTC = 100% bonus TSA
Tier 3: 0.3+ BTC = 200% bonus TSA
TSA Bonus by purchasing with ETH
The amount of TSA bonus is connected to the amount of your ETH deposit.

Tier 1 : 0.5+ ETH = 50% bonus TSA
Tier 2: 2+ ETH = 100% bonus TSA
Tier 3: 10+ ETH = 200% bonus TSA
